payload.actions_taken: ["reran required bootstrap and preserved its authoritative-state refusal","kept commit 133e20c553a43f1762211b14fd1c6c167cdbaf41 unchanged and based this correction on it","replaced the single positive bytecode clone with separate negative-control and guarded clones","forced PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX to the same in-checkout relative location in both disposable clones","ran the Phase 2-to-Phase 1 import and Phase 7 focused release-proof sequence without PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE and required pyc creation Git-status drift and the Phase 7 status trap","ran the identical sequence in a fresh clone with PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE one and required no pycache no pyc and no Git-status drift","kept all clone creation bytecode and cleanup outside the primary checkout","allowed only the exact additive causality changeset through the Phase 3 later-phase path guard","updated US-112 diagnostic documentation and Phase 6 additive replay bindings","ran focused workflow Pre-Merge trust Phase 3 Phase 6 documentation and diff checks without remote mutation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["use an explicit in-clone Python cache prefix instead of relying on ambient interpreter prefix state","require a failing unguarded negative control before accepting the guarded clean result","use fresh clones for control and guarded cases so the control cannot contaminate the positive proof","keep the workflow-global PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE setting unchanged","retain all Phase 6 Phase 7 platform promotion signing and Phase 8 authority boundaries"]
payload.errors: ["bootstrap refused because the pre-existing authoritative core state is unavailable and no database was initialized","the focused matrix query could not run because harness.db is absent and no replacement was initialized","review found that unsetting PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX alone may leave macOS sys.pycache_prefix externally configured so the original positive-only clone did not prove causality"]
payload.harness_friction: The authoritative Harness epoch remains unavailable, so bootstrap and matrix queries fail closed and CLI-authored records cannot run. The correction preserves that state and supplies an additive replayable trace rather than initializing or replacing the missing database.
payload.notes: This trace corrects the reproducibility proof recorded by phase7_11 without rewriting that prior additive record. The workflow guard itself remains unchanged. No push, dispatch, main mutation, tag, release, package, publish, production signing, Windows support claim, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, promotion, or Phase 8 action occurred. Duration and token estimates are unavailable.
payload.task_summary: Proved the Pre-Merge bytecode guard causes clean repository status
